title: Writing - Part 1: Environmental Responsibility
description: Your class has been discussing ways that individuals can help protect the environment.

content.question: Write an essay discussing two of the ways in your notes. You should explain which way you think is more effective, giving reasons for your opinion.

opinions: Small individual actions do not make a real difference.
Every small step matters if enough people take it.
Governments should act instead of blaming individuals.

structure.introduction: Introduce the importance of environmental protection and the two ways you will discuss.
structure.bodyParagraph1: Discuss the first way (e.g., reducing plastic use) and why it helps.
structure.bodyParagraph2: Discuss the second way (e.g., using public transport) and its environmental impact.
structure.conclusion: Evaluate both ways and state which is more effective.

content.modelAnswer:
Environmental problems such as climate change and pollution are among the most serious challenges facing our planet today. While governments and businesses have a major role to play, individuals can also make a significant difference through their daily choices. This essay will discuss reducing plastic use and using public transport as two important ways to help.

Reducing plastic consumption is one of the simplest yet most effective actions an individual can take. Plastic waste pollutes oceans and harms wildlife, so choosing reusable bags, bottles and containers can have a direct positive impact. When millions of people make this change, the results are considerable.

Using public transport instead of private cars is another powerful way to reduce one's environmental footprint. Buses and trains carry many passengers at once, meaning far fewer carbon emissions per person. This is especially impactful in cities where traffic congestion is a major source of air pollution.

In conclusion, both approaches are valuable, but I believe reducing plastic use is slightly more accessible for most people. It requires no special infrastructure and can be adopted immediately, making it an excellent starting point for anyone wishing to live more sustainably.
